film.title: Young at Heart
film.overview: The lives and romances of three sisters in a musical family; the youngest daughter's life is complicated by the subsequent arrival of a charming composer and a cynical music arranger.

dialogues.dialogue: You know my mom doesn't like to eat alone.  So invite her over!  What? Are you ashamed of me or something?  I'll give you some sauce to take home.  I wish my dad were here.
Just taking a look at what's out there.  - How was school? - The same.  The seminar thing was about pride today.  Go figure.  You're what I take pride in you know... raising you.
The seminar thing was about pride today.  Go figure.  You're what I take pride in you know... raising you.  I don't know how much credit I can take  but I'm really proud of who you are.
